source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Carol M. Highsmith Archive
license: Public domain (dedicated to the public by the photographer per 1991 LoC agreement)
title: Kayakers, Juneau, Alaska
description: A group of sea kayakers paddling across a calm Southeast Alaska bay near Juneau, with forested islands in the distance. Shows the small-group guided kayaking that is a signature Juneau excursion.
alt: Group of sea kayakers paddling across a calm bay near Juneau with forested islands in the distance
